title.description: Reserved title-screen ink ambience bed for the opening shell.

map.description: Reserved route-map ambience for travel through the chapter topology.

combat.description: Reserved combat ambience bed for battlefield tension.

reward.description: Reserved post-battle reward ambience for card and relic choices.

event.description: Reserved story-event ambience for ink-corrupted jianghu encounters.

shop.description: Reserved shop ambience for merchant and deck-service surfaces.

rest.description: Reserved rest-site ambience for healing and card-upgrade pauses.

final.description: Reserved finale ambience for victory, defeat, and final-choice screens.

ui.description: Reserved short UI confirmation sound for buttons and toggles.

card.description: Reserved card-play sound for martial technique execution.

victory.description: Reserved victory cue for successful combat resolution.

defeat.description: Reserved defeat cue for failed combat resolution.

final-choice.description: Reserved final-choice cue for chapter-ending decisions.

hit.description: Reserved combat cue for damage impact and hit feedback.

block.description: Reserved combat cue for guard, armor, and block feedback.

status.description: Reserved combat cue for charm, ink, weak, vulnerable, and other status changes.

turn.description: Reserved combat cue for player and enemy turn transitions.
